title: 1.1: Extracts both per-match concerns (result construction and webhook verification) from FromData into a dedicated helper method on customRegexWebhook
1.2: Runs per-match verification concurrently so verification HTTP requests for different permutated regex matches can overlap
1.3: Ensures concurrent workers exit promptly on context cancellation
1.4: Provides an error propagation path from concurrent workers back to FromData's error return
1.5: Collects all detectors.Result values from the per-match concurrent workers only after all workers have finished
1.6: Processes every element of the matches slice from permutateMatches in FromData of custom_detectors.go producing one detectors.Result per match on the non-error path
1.7: Preserves the non-verification fast path by emitting results directly when verify is false
1.8: Preserves raw Result construction by concatenating values[0] from each match map entry
1.9: Preserves the verification request payload structure keyed by detector name
1.10: Preserves endpoint-iteration semantics by trying each verification config in order until one returns HTTP 200 or all configs are exhausted
1.11: Preserves header forwarding by both operations (parsing and trimming) on configured verification request headers
1.12: Closes each verification HTTP response body after the request completes
4.1: Changes the function signature of any of the 4 exported functions (NewWebhookCustomRegex, FromData, Keywords, Type) in custom_detectors.go
4.2: Alters any of the 2 pre-processing steps (regex matching and permutation via permutateMatches) preceding match processing in FromData
